title: Modern Lights
description: Adds a variety of new chromatic light blocks
body:
# Modern Lights

![Row of Lights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/718ca95617e77617946c2ad8fb7b8dd131fcc73d_0.webp)

Adds a variety of new chromatic light blocks.

## Features
- Andesite Frame
- Luminous Blocks
- Luminous Blocks [Full]
- Luminous Slabs
- Luminous Slabs [Full]
- Luminous Vertical Slabs
- Luminous Vertical Slabs [Full]
- Luminous Mini Blocks
- Luminous Mini Blocks [Full]
- Mini Lights
- Ceiling Lights
- Panels
- Small Panels

```
All the blocks are available in all the 16 colors (Except Andesite Frame)
```

## Notes
- Right-clicking any block toggles it on/off.
- Giving any block a redstone signal will also toggle the block on/off
- When a block is being powered by redstone, it can not be toggled by right-clicking

Based on the works of [1-Jammy](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-lights) and [Flanks255](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-light)
